summary: Tested Session Prep Checklist feature (new) and exhaustion_level backend persistence fix. All backend API tests passed (6/6). Frontend UI verified: AI Session Planner has 3 mode tabs (Outline, Replay, Checklist), checklist items grouped by 8 categories with priority badges (HIGH/MED/LOW), progress bar showing completion percentage, and 'Generate Prep Checklist from this Outline' button on expanded outlines.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing campaign b51ba0e9-5b08-44ed-b3dd-4a97dd2a09f6 and character 0bda5cf5-b8be-40c8-b2bc-b030ea70c366
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session Prep Checklist feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/ai/session-checklist/{campaign_id}, GET /api/ai/session-checklists/{campaign_id}, PATCH /api/ai/session-checklist/{checklist_id}. Frontend: AI Session Planner in GM Screen (/gm-screen/{campaignId}) has 3 tabs - Outline, Replay, Checklist. Exhaustion_level field now persists via PATCH /api/characters/{id}.

session_checklist_backend.POST_generate_checklist: PASS - Generates AI checklist from campaign context
session_checklist_backend.GET_all_checklists: PASS - Returns list of checklists with items
session_checklist_backend.checklist_structure: PASS - Items have id, category, text, priority, completed fields

session_checklist_frontend.three_mode_tabs: PASS - Outline, Replay, Checklist tabs visible
session_checklist_frontend.checklist_tab: PASS - Shows existing checklists with progress indicators (0/15, 1/13)
session_checklist_frontend.progress_bar: PASS - PREP PROGRESS bar with percentage
session_checklist_frontend.category_grouping: PASS - Items grouped by NPCS, MAPS, ENCOUNTERS, LOOT, STORY, ATMOSPHERE, HANDOUTS, RULES
session_checklist_frontend.priority_badges: PASS - HIGH (red), MED (orange), LOW (gray) badges on items
session_checklist_frontend.generate_from_outline_button: PASS - 'Generate Prep Checklist from this Outline' button visible on expanded outlines
session_checklist_frontend.checkbox_toggle: PASS - 14 checkbox icons found, items clickable

exhaustion_level_persistence.PATCH_update: PASS - exhaustion_level field accepted in PATCH /api/characters/{id}
